title: 1981-04-16_Pat_134.txt
key_claims: The AI voice's statement, "A long extinct true cosmos + it's still there," means that the objective structure of reality (the Greek Kosmos) still exists, but humanity's ability to perceive it went "extinct" 2000 years ago.
The perception of true reality was destroyed by the "faulty physics" of the Greek Atomists (Leucippus and Democritus), who falsely introduced the concepts of "the void" and discontinuous matter.

The 2-74 meta-abstraction annihilated this 2000-year-old error, allowing Dick to phase back into the "continuum reality" known to Parmenides and Pythagoras, where space, time, and causation operate differently.

In this continuum reality, causal law (Heimarmene) is abolished, and divine intervention (Pronoia) becomes not a suspension of natural law, but the fundamental, natural order of how the universe operates.
recurring_concepts: **Phylogenic Abreaction**: Dick's mind reverting backwards down the evolutionary timeline to recapture the worldview of the pre-Socratic Greeks, before the "Fall" of Atomism.
reading_excerpt: The AI voice's statement, "A long extinct true cosmos + it's still there," means that the objective structure of reality (the Greek Kosmos) still exists, but humanity's ability to perceive it went "extinct" 2000 years ago.
